name: Taj: Divided by Blood
overview: In his quest to find a worthy successor for his grand legacy, Emperor Akbar sparks a war among his sons. What follows is a terrifying battle for power, filled with politics, betrayals, and bloodshed.

trailers.title: Taj: Divided By Blood | Official Trailer | A ZEE5 Original | Naseeruddin, Dharmendra, Aditi | 3 Mar
